\tzpentry{ID5567}{Phase Field Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5567 introduces Phase Field Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + K R(t)\,\sin\!\big(\Psi(t)-\phi_i\big), \end{equation}
